# Learning & DevelopmentCertificate Program

Give your organization a competitive edge with AIHR Learning & Development Certificate Program that blends strategic thinking, learning design, and analytical skills. Start building employee learning strategies that close skills gaps, drive digital transformation, and boost retention. Trusted by professionals at Meta, Henkel, and P&G, this program enables you to deliver measurable business impact.

ENROLL NOW

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

What members say about this program:

Packed with practical examples, case studies and learning materials

L&D Strategy, Skills Gap, and Learning Analytics modules were GREAT

Great overview of the skills and methodologies to implement L&D strategy

Trusted by 85,000+ 
HR professionals

## What you will learn

Design and implement an L&D strategy aligned with key business priorities

Apply learning design principles to create effective employee training programs

Identify and close skills gaps with targeted learning and development interventions

Use learning analytics to measure and show the business impact of L&D efforts

### Why AIHR?

✓ Globally accredited & recognized (SHRM, HRCI, more…)

✓ Join 85,000+ members worldwide

✓ Future-focused and human-centric

✓ All the tools you need to level up your career

Read our 12470 reviews

## Learning & Development Certificate Program structure

Watch program overview video

36 hours of learning

Learning & Development Strategy

2 modules

• 8 lessons

• 4 hours

Develop a high-impact L&D strategy

Develop a Learning and Development strategy that turns your organization’s long-term objectives into measurable results. In this L&D course, you’ll learn to map organizational learning maturity, design formal learning programs, and strengthen informal learning practices. After completing the course, you’ll be able to position L&D as a high-value strategic function that drives employee development and retention.

MODULE #1

Building a Culture of Learning

Lesson 1 – Building a Culture of Learning

Lesson 2 – Mapping Organizational Learning Maturity

Designing Digital Learning Experiences

5 modules

• 6 hours

Master learning design for the digital workplace

Transform your organization into a modern learning and development leader. In this Designing Digital Learning Experiences module, you’ll learn to apply the Digital Learning Strategy Canvas to shape your L&D strategy, design impactful learning experiences, and align them with organizational goals. You’ll also discover how to get stakeholder buy-in and create a culture of continuous learning.

Skills Gap Analysis

1 module

• 5 lessons

• 3 hours

Identify skills gaps & deliver targeted learning and development solutions

Remove guesswork from learning and development in HR. In this course, you’ll learn to accurately assess current and future employee learning needs through a structured skills gap analysis. You’ll explore practical examples that help map your organization’s upskilling needs and design targeted learning and development interventions to close gaps and strengthen your L&D strategy.

MODULE #1

Fit for Purpose

Lesson 1 – Introduction

Lesson 2 – Getting Started

Lesson 3 – Quantitative Impact

Lesson 4 – Gap Analysis and Action Plan

Coaching

2 modules

• 6 lessons

• 4 hours

Boost employee development with effective coaching

This course covers both the theory and practice of workplace coaching, teaching how to integrate it into your L&D strategy. You’ll understand different coaching roles, apply the GROW model, and see how managerial coaching strengthens leadership skills. You’ll also learn how to select the right coach for your organization and use coaching to drive measurable employee performance improvement.

MODULE #1

Lesson 1 – Introduction to Coaching

Learning Analytics

1 module

• 4 lessons

• 2 hours

Show the business impact of L&D with training metrics

Use learning analytics to make evidence-based decisions and prove the value of your learning and development strategy. This course from AIHR takes you through the foundations of L&D analytics, from measuring costs and benefits to calculating learning ROI. You’ll also apply the Kirkpatrick Model to set KPIs, collect meaningful data, and evaluate training effectiveness.

Capstone Project

Project

• 4.5 hours

Through the capstone project, you’ll apply your learning and development skills to a realistic organizational challenge. This hands-on component of the AIHR Learning and Development Certificate Program walks you through the complete L&D process, including business needs analysis, strategy design, learning experience creation, and data-driven impact measurement.

You need to pass the capstone project to earn your certificate!

You can retry the capstone project and exam as often as you like.

All materials needed to complete the project will be provided.

Explore the full curriculum in pdf and **receive email reminders** when enrollment opens

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

## What AIHR Members & Teams get

### Certification and Accreditation

AIHR is a registered education institute on LinkedIn and a recertification provider with global HR associations. Earn your AIHR certificaiton while earning recertification credits through courses and live events.

Upon completion of the program, you will receive a digital certificate to showcase in the education section of your LinkedIn profile.

Preview your certificate

### HR Resource Library

Never start from scratch and save time by using off-the-shelf templates, playbooks, and tools from the resource library. 
Preview the Resource Library

### Weekly webinars with HR experts

Stay up-to-date with the latest HR trends and innovations by joining regular live events with Subject Matter Experts – and get SHRM & HRCI credits while you’re at it. 
Preview live events for members

### Worldwide HR Community

Join a worldwide HR community – get answers to your pressing questions from experts and challenge your peers in engaging discussions. 
Learn more in platform demo

### Mini courses

Learn more in less time with bite-sized knowledge for busy minds. Get comfortable with a new topic in just 10 minutes. 
Preview course lessons

### AIHR Copilot

Trained on AIHR’s 1000+ articles, 500+ hours of video lessons, and 100+ downloadable resources, the AIHR Copilot puts reliable HR answers at your fingertips. Get quick answers, expert advice, practical resources, and actionable material to get the job done. 
Try out Copilot in platform demo

### Personal Coaching

**Included in Full Access and Team Plans.** Learning coaches act as your personal learning rocket fuel by providing the support and accountability you need to progress.

### Advanced Team Reporting (Team Plans)

Get insights into your team’s learning tracks and engagement data. View your team’s progress, easily manage the learning paths and make sure you’re on track.

## FAQs

Need help making the right choice? Speak with an admissions advisor or send them a message.

### Why should I enroll in this Learning & Development Certification Program?

AIHR’s online Learning & Development Certificate Program equips you with the learning and development skills to design impactful strategies, close skills gaps, create effective learning experiences, and use analytics to measure and communicate results. Graduates have applied these competencies to build successful L&D strategies at organizations such as Meta, Henkel, and P&G. Upon completion, you’ll earn a digital certificate to showcase your expertise.

In today’s volatile, uncertain, chaotic, and ambiguous (VUCA) world, continuous learning is essential for organizational success. Businesses need HR and L&D professionals who can develop employee learning strategies that directly support business goals, and this learning and development training helps you become one.

### Who is the AIHR Learning & Development Certificate Program for?

The AIHR Learning and Development Certificate Program is designed for HR professionals looking to upskill in L&D and strengthen their ability to design, deliver, and evaluate impactful employee learning strategies. It’s ideal for HRBPs, talent development specialists, training managers, and anyone responsible for building learning programs that drive business results.

### What other topics does the online training cover besides L&D strategy, skill gaps, and learning analytics?

In addition to those core areas, AIHR Learning and Development Certificate Program covers learning approaches, effective learning design and training delivery, knowledge management, organizational learning maturity, and how L&D fits into a broader talent strategy.

You’ll also explore informal learning practices, methods for building a learning culture, and practical tools to support corporate learning and development. A full overview of modules and lessons is available in the syllabus.

### How long do I have to complete AIHR L&D Certificate Program, and is there a set schedule?

AIHR Learning & Development Certificate Program is 100% online and self-paced, so you can decide when and how much time to dedicate each day, week, or month.

You’ll have 12 months of access to the student portal, lessons, and materials. Most participants finish in 3–4 months, investing around 35 hours to earn their digital Learning and Development Certificate.

### Is the capstone project graded?

Yes! Your digital Learning and Development Certificate is awarded only after passing the capstone project. If you don’t pass on your first try, you can re-submit as many times as needed. All instructions, templates, and resources to complete the project are included in the program.

### Which certification is best for Learning and Development?

The best L&D certification depends on your career goals, current experience, and the skills you want to develop. For HR professionals who want to strengthen their expertise in employee development strategy, instructional design, and learning analytics, AIHR is the best learning and development certification.

The program is fully online, recognized for SHRM PDCs, HRCI-, and ATD-accredited, and trusted by professionals at organizations like Meta, Henkel, and P&G.

### What qualifications do I need for Learning and Development?

While there are no universal formal requirements to work in Learning and Development, employers often look for HR or training experience, strong communication skills, and knowledge of learning design and strategy.

The AIHR Learning and Development Certificate Program helps you build these learning and development skills through a fully online, SHRM- and HRCI-accredited curriculum. Upon completion, you’ll receive a digital certificate you can share with employers to showcase your expertise.

### What resources can help me get started in Learning and Development?

Here are helpful resources to get started in Learning and Development:

* Learning and Development: A Comprehensive Guide
* How To Develop Winning Learning and Development Strategies
* What Is Employee Training (+ How To Develop an Employee Training Program)
* Skills Gap Analysis: All You Need To Know
* A Guide to Conducting a Training Needs Analysis

### Do you offer a money-back guarantee for certificate programs?

Yes! We pride ourselves on high-quality programs. That’s why we feel comfortable offering a 30-day money-back guarantee to ensure that you are 100% satisfied. If for any reason it’s not your thing, you can send us an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) to request a full refund.

### Is this program eligible for recertification credits by SHRM, HRCI and others?

The Academy to Innovate HR (AIHR) is a trusted recertification partner of the world’s leading HR Associations, together representing over 1,000,000 HR professionals globally and offers HR programs eligible for recertification credits.

With AIHR, your learning hours count twice — once toward building in-demand HR skills, and again toward maintaining your existing credentials. 

This program is eligible for:

* **24** SHRM PDCs
* **24 HR (General)** Business HRCI Credits
* **30** HRPA PDCs

See the full list of HR associations offering credits for the **Learning & Development Certificate Program**.

Plus, as a registered education provider on LinkedIn, AIHR makes it easy to showcase your new credentials directly on your profile, boosting your professional visibility.

It provided a solid foundation in key L&D concepts, including learning strategy, coaching, workforce planning, instructional design, and training evaluation. The course combined theory with real-world applications, making it easy to understand how to apply the concepts in the workplace. I would highly recommend this program to anyone looking to develop their expertise in Learning & Development.
